thanksBody: We've received your enquiry for {{hotel}}. Our team will reach out shortly.
enquireSub: Share a few details and we'll get back to you with availability and rates.

submitErr.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please try again in a few minutes.

consent: By submitting, you agree to be contacted by {{hotel}} about your enquiry.

previewMode: Preview mode — analytics not recorded. Approve and publish to make this page live.
finalRate: Final rate confirmed by {{hotel}} after enquiry — depends on dates, party size, and inventory.
poweredBy: Powered by VAiyu · Hotel operations & guest journeys
